puzzle.title: The Vow of Devotion
puzzle.intro: Within a household known for its piety, a devoted soul made a solemn promise to Allah. This pledge, born from a deep desire, would set in motion a miraculous chain of events, leading to the birth of one of the most honored individuals in history. Can you uncover the identity of this person whose sincere vow was accepted and answered in an unexpected way?
clues: I was part of a blessed and chosen family, known for our righteousness.
I longed for a child and made a heartfelt plea to my Lord to grant me one.
In my gratitude, I made a vow to dedicate whatever was in my womb entirely to the service of Allah.
When I gave birth, I was surprised, for my child was not what I had expected for the role I envisioned.
I delivered a female, and I named her Maryam, seeking Allah's protection for her and her descendants from the accursed Shaytan.
My Lord accepted my offering with a beautiful acceptance and caused my daughter to grow in a beautiful manner, placing her under the care of Zakariyya.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: The wife of Zakariyya
The mother of Musa
The wife of 'Imran
The wife of Prophet Ibrahim (Sarah)
The wife of Fir'awn (Asiya)

trial.label: What was my central act?
options: Making a vow to dedicate my child to Allah
Hiding my child in a basket in the river
Patiently enduring a severe illness
Building a sacred house with my son
Arguing with angels about my people's fate
trial.answer: Making a vow to dedicate my child to Allah

location.label: Key Element
options: The child I expected to be a male
The staff that turned into a serpent
The clay birds that came to life
The ark that saved all the believers
The coat of many colors
location.answer: The child I expected to be a male

outcome.label: What was the result of my vow?
options: My son was saved from being sacrificed
My daughter Maryam was accepted into Allah's service
My husband was struck silent for three days
My child was given the ability to speak from the cradle
My child became a king with a vast army
outcome.answer: My daughter Maryam was accepted into Allah's service

puzzle.arabic: إِذْ قَالَتِ ٱمْرَأَتُ عِمْرَٰنَ رَبِّ إِنِّى نَذَرْتُ لَكَ مَا فِى بَطْنِى مُحَرَّرًۭا فَتَقَبَّلْ مِنِّىٓ ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
puzzle.verse: [Mention, O Muḥammad], when the wife of ʿImrān said, "My Lord, indeed I have pledged to You what is in my womb, consecrated [for Your service], so accept this from me. Indeed, You are the Hearing, the Knowing." (3:35)
